title: DependencyIndex
description: Per-file dependency edges plus repo-level package dependencies (e.g. pip, npm, maven).

files.description: Map keyed by relative file path.

imports.description: Resolved internal file paths this file depends on.

imports_raw.description: Raw import strings (module/symbol names) before resolution.

imported_by.description: Reverse-edge list of internal files that import this one.

external.description: Per-language declared external dependencies (pip, npm, maven, etc).
